title: keb's tweaks Modpack
description: keb's handcrafted modpack based on Content SMP's modlist. Including some other mods that I added. 🌟
body:
**Modpack heavily based on content SMP's modlist.** ⭐
Main mods:
- Create
- Nature's spirit
- Another Furniture
- Farmer's Delight

![modpack image made by my friend](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/130d360adaf75a5b7fde9858c727968aa99fcd9a_0.webp)


<details>
<summary>Mention</summary>

I should also mention that, none of these mods are mine. The only things I personally created where datapacks as well as resource packs.

</details>
